name: ChainMark: Model-Free LLM Watermarking with Closed-Form Calibration
summary: arXiv:2607.18445v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Regulatory regimes such as the EU AI Act mandate machine-readable marking of synthetic text, but existing watermark detectors rely on the generatin...
description: arXiv:2607.18445v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Regulatory regimes such as the EU AI Act mandate machine-readable marking of synthetic text, but existing watermark detectors rely on the generating LM and on heuristic thresholds with no closed-form calibration. We introduce ChainMark, an active watermark that partitions the vocabulary into S states via keyed SHA-256 and forces a hard Markov tr...
author: Chengheng Li-Chen, Kyuhee Kim
